What We Do
Intelligent Industrial
Solutions & Engineering
Delivering advanced AI, embedded, robotics, and industrial technology solutions engineered for modern manufacturing, automation, and safety-critical environments.

Safety Product Solutions

Intelligent worker and asset safety systems with real-time monitoring, tracking, and industrial risk prevention.

R&D Services

Research-driven product innovation, rapid prototyping, validation, and technology development for industrial applications.

Embedded Systems

Real-time embedded firmware, controller development, edge intelligence, and custom hardware integration.

IoT Solutions

Scalable Industrial IoT infrastructure with connected sensors, analytics, cloud integration, and smart monitoring systems.

Welding Innovations

Smart welding monitoring systems with real-time current, voltage, gas flow, and process analytics capabilities.

Robotics Solutions

Autonomous robotic systems, intelligent navigation, industrial automation, and AI-assisted robotics engineering.

AI Deep Technology

Advanced AI algorithms, computer vision, anomaly detection, and deep learning systems for industrial intelligence.

PCB Engineering

Custom PCB design, multilayer board development, circuit optimization, and electronics hardware engineering.

Drone & Autonomous Systems

Intelligent aerial and autonomous platforms for surveillance, industrial inspection, mapping, monitoring, and smart mobility applications.

capabilities

Engineering intelligent edge systems for real-world safety

Embedded Intelligence

High-performance firmware for ARM & RISC-V systems with deterministic real-time control.

Edge AI Systems

Deployable machine learning models optimized for on-device inference and decision-making.

Safety-Critical Design

Fail-safe architectures with watchdogs, redundancy, and compliance-driven engineering.

Industrial Connectivity

Seamless integration with IIoT protocols, gateways, and cloud-edge hybrid systems.

system flow

From signal acquisition to intelligent actuation

Sensor Input
Edge Processing
AI Inference
Safety Validation
Actuation
↳ Real-time execution with ultra-low latency edge intelligence
why work with zeekers?

Engineering Beyond Conventional Automation

Backed by 40+ years of industrial experience and driven by a highly skilled team of engineers, developers, researchers, and technology specialists, Zeekers delivers innovative solutions built on deep technical expertise and real-world industrial understanding. From research and product development to deployment and optimization, our team focuses on building scalable, reliable, and future-ready technologies that improve industrial efficiency, operational safety, and digital transformation across modern industries.

01

Deep Embedded Expertise

From firmware architecture to edge computing, we build intelligent embedded systems optimized for industrial-grade performance.

02

AI-Driven Innovation

We integrate AI, analytics, and intelligent automation into industrial ecosystems for smarter operations and predictive decision-making.

03

Industry-Focused Solutions

Every solution is engineered with practical industrial workflows, scalability, and deployment efficiency in mind.

04

Safety & Reliability

We prioritize mission-critical reliability, operational safety, and real-time monitoring across all engineering systems.

25+

Industrial Deployments

AI + OT

Integrated Intelligence

24/7

Engineering Support

Edge Ready

Future-Proof Systems
Technology

Platforms, protocols & tools we engineer with

STM32 / ESP32 NVIDIA Jetson C / C++ / Rust Python / AI Modbus / CAN MQTT / OPC UA Edge + Cloud
Built to integrate with your existing industrial ecosystem.

Ready to engineer your future?

Talk to our team about industrial AI & embedded solutions. First consultation is free.
